topic: south-facing exposure and ripening in the northern hemisphere
trigger_keywords: aumenta el nivel de alcohol potencial
exposición sur en el hemisferio norte

steps.label: cause
steps.text: In the Northern Hemisphere, a south-facing vineyard receives more direct sunlight.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Greater solar exposure warms the site and supports photosynthesis and sugar accumulation during ripening.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Grapes can achieve greater ripeness and potential alcohol than on a cooler, less exposed aspect, subject to heat and water availability.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Grapes can achieve greater ripeness and potential alcohol than on a cooler, less exposed aspect, subject to heat and water availability.
